children.heading: Semiannual report
children.label: a Semiannual report
children.text: Not less frequently than once every 6 months, the Attorney General shall fully inform, in a manner consistent with national security, the congressional intelligence committees and the Committees on the Judiciary of the Senate and the House of Representatives, consistent with the Rules of the House of Representatives, the Standing Rules of the Senate, and Senate Resolution 400 of the 94th Congress or any successor Senate resolution, concerning the implementation of this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: any certifications submitted in accordance with during the reporting period;section 1881a(h) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to each determination under , the reasons for exercising the authority under such section;section 1881a(c)(2) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: any directives issued under during the reporting period;section 1881a(i) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: a description of the judicial review during the reporting period of such certifications and targeting and minimization procedures adopted in accordance with subsections (d) and (e) of and utilized with respect to an acquisition under such section, including a copy of an order or pleading in connection with such review that contains a significant legal interpretation of the provisions of ;section 1881a of this titlesection 1881a of this title

children.label: E
children.text: any actions taken to challenge or enforce a directive under paragraph (4) or (5) of ;section 1881a(i) of this title

children.label: F
children.text: any compliance reviews conducted by the Attorney General or the Director of National Intelligence of acquisitions authorized under ;section 1881a(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: with a directive issued by the Attorney General and the Director of National Intelligence under , including incidents of noncompliance by a specified person to whom the Attorney General and Director of National Intelligence issued a directive under ; andsection 1881a(i) of this titlesection 1881a(i) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: by an element of the intelligence community with procedures and guidelines adopted in accordance with subsections (d), (e), (f)(1), and (g) of ; andsection 1881a of this title

children.label: H
children.text: any procedures implementing ;section 1881a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the total number of applications made for orders under ;section 1881b(b) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: granted;

children.label: ii
children.text: modified; and

children.label: iii
children.text: denied; and

children.label: C
children.text: the total number of emergency acquisitions authorized by the Attorney General under and the total number of subsequent orders approving or denying such acquisitions; andsection 1881b(d) of this title

children.label: i
